---
title: "Gallery"
lightbox: true
---

::: {.content-section}

Explore our lab, research activities, and team events.

::: {.gallery-grid}

::: {.gallery-item}
![Simulator](images/simulator_1.jpg){fig-alt="Racing simulator setup"}

::: {.gallery-caption}
Our racing simulator setup
:::

:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![Simulator](images/simulator_2.jpg){fig-alt="Racing simulator setup, alternate view"}

::: {.gallery-caption}
Our racing simulator setup
:::

:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![Simulator](images/simulator_3.png){fig-alt="Driving in the simulator with eye tracking"}

::: {.gallery-caption}
Driving in the simulator with eye tracking
:::

:::

::: {.gallery-item}
![Blickshift Analytics](images/blickshift_1.png){fig-alt="Blickshift Analytics gaze analysis software"}

::: {.gallery-caption}
Blickshift Analytics gaze analysis software
:::

:::

::: {.gallery-item}
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/VKLfnimfnQM title="Lab research video demonstration" >}}
:::

:::

:::
